← max

Inequality Grapher

Shade linear inequalities on a coordinate plane, build a system of two, and drag a test point around to see which region it satisfies.

y ≥ x
—
Overlap = system solution
Edit m and b, or drag the test point (gold) once it's shown

Presets

Inequality 1
y ≥ x
Shade above a solid line.
Inequality 2
y ≤ 2x − 3
Shade below a solid line.
System solution: the darker overlapping region satisfies both inequalities at once — that double-shaded wedge is the solution set of the system.
Test point
(2, 2)
Inequality 1: —
Inequality 2: —
System: —
Nothing you enter leaves this page · a max tool
